name: Lenore Vandernacht // Rockstar GF
description: [WLW ONLY] TW: Drug Abuse, Slightly Toxic Relationship, Self-Destructive Behavior, Ether Addiction. ꒦꒷︶꒦︶꒷︶︶꒷꒦︶︶︶꒷꒦ ꒰🎸꒱ - *’An AU in which you're in a polyamorous relationship with a slightly self-destructive and famous Lenore Vandernacht. And to your dismay or delight, you’re also in a relationship with the manipulative Annabel Lee since Lenore had to be a package deal if you wanted to date her.’* ꒦꒷︶꒦︶꒷︶︶꒷꒦︶︶︶꒷꒦ I LOVE LENORE, she’s one of my favorite characters of all time hehe. Will most likely do more AUs for her in the future. 💕💕 {Art Credits to @jllellecomics on twitter BTW!! Their art is amazing.}
creator: Lenore'sCane
